category_sources: source_facts.description says it extracts ISO9660 data from Nero nrg files; source_facts.executables lists nrg2iso.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is nrg2iso; official homepage title/path identifies nrg2iso.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the upstream project page and best official documentation surface found for this small utility.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; no official source-control repository was identified from the supplied upstream homepage/source facts.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and source_facts.executables identify a CLI converter for Nero NRG to ISO9660 data.
